note_on_parallelism: D depends on A+B interfaces, E depends on D's IterationMetrics. All 5 were run simultaneously in this batch because interface contracts are embedded in each prompt. A strict runner should respect depends_on.

agents.name: data-adapters
agents.description: JS adapter modules bridging curriculum_render and lrsl-driller, plus Python orchestrator

agents.name: simulator-core
agents.description: Synthetic student engine: KC memory, forgetting curves, prompts, student class, cohort manager

agents.name: config-data
agents.description: Configuration files, persona definitions, framework extraction, KC vocabulary

agents.name: loop-engine
agents.description: Autoresearch loop: metrics, git ops, inner runner, outer progression

agents.name: optimizer
agents.description: Failure analysis, patch generation, quality gates, multi-model consensus

agents.name: scripts-and-tests
agents.description: Entry point scripts (run_experiment, run_loop, run_course, tag_kcs, promote, calibrate) and test files
